channel.title: Rsync on My Awesome Site
channel.description: Recent content in Rsync on My Awesome Site

item.title: Rclone: A Command-line program to Manage Files on Cloud Storage
item.author: wildanpastioke@gmail.com (Wildan)
item.description: Do you have a lot of cloud storages that you want to manage it directly through terminal? With rclone, managing many cloud storages has never been easier than this before..

item.title: rsync: A Powerful Tool for Backing Up Data
item.author: wildanpastioke@gmail.com (Wildan)
item.description: The simplest and easiest way to backup your data…
